tweets.text:
Harvard just admitted it's in a “major, major, major crisis.” And this time, it’s not coming from Fox, it’s straight from The New York Times.

Why? 

Because Trump isn’t just talking. He’s taking them apart.

First came the criminally charged student awarded a fellowship tied to CAIR.

Then Trump fired back: Yank the tax exemption.

Now?

Funding's drying up. Legal pressure’s mounting. And behind closed doors, Harvard officials are panicking because Trump is using the full weight of the government to go after their activist empire.

Harvard wanted to play politics.

Trump said: Fine — let’s play. And now he's running the table.

https://t.co/nEbB2XhXQY
